<?php namespace Illuminate\Http\Client\Events; use Illuminate\Http\Client\ConnectionException; use Illuminate\Http\Client\Request; class ConnectionFailed { /** * The request instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Http\Client\Request */ public $request; /** * The exception instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Http\Client\ConnectionException */ public $exception; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param \Illuminate\Http\Client\Request $request * @param \Illuminate\Http\Client\ConnectionException $exception */ public function __construct(Request $request, ConnectionException $exception) { $this->request = $request; $this->exception = $exception; } }
